metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls
The Unified Operations Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

text.description: The GUID of the Calculation that has been created
text.title: Calculation

text_1.description: The GUID of the Processing Log for the Parent Flow
text_1.title: Processing Log

text_2.description: The GUID of the Quote of the Calculation
text_2.title: Quote

text_4.description: The User that initiated the process
text_4.title: Process Owner

text_5.description: The GUID of the Customer set for the Quote
text_5.title: Customer

text_6.description: The Code of the Company set for the Quote
text_6.title: Company Code

text_7.description: The Name of the Customer set for the Quote
text_7.title: Customer Name

text_8.description: The Accountnumber of the Customer set for the Quote
text_8.title: Customer Accountnumber

Remove_Duplicates_from_Payload.description: Remove Duplicates from Payload (if an item has the exact same price in different Trade Agreement positions)

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Create_Calculation_Sales_Prices')?['Ids'])} Sales Prices successfully added to Calculation @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

parameters.request/url: https://@{parameters('EnvVar | Unified Operations Instance (hso_EnvVarUnifiedOperationsInstance)')}/data/SalesPriceAgreements?$filter=dataAreaId eq '@{triggerBody()?['text_6']}' and CustomerAccountNumber eq '@{triggerBody()?['text_8']}' and ((PriceApplicableFromDate le @{utcNow()} and PriceApplicableToDate ge @{utcNow()}) or (PriceApplicableFromDate le @{utcNow()} and PriceApplicableToDate eq 1900-01-01T12:00:00Z))&cross-company=true

Get_FinOps_Trade_Agreements.description: Fetch all Trade Agreement Positions where either a specific date is set or no date is set for FromDate and/or ToDate

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Fetch currently valid FinOps Trade Agreements for selected Customer "@{triggerBody()?['text_7']}" (@{triggerBody()?['text_8']}) @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value:
[INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Remove_records_without_ProductNumber'))} FinOps Trade Agreements retrieved. 
[INF] - [@{utcNow()}] -  Start cleaning of duplicate Trade Agreements to proceed only with highest Price for same Product Number. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value:
[INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Cleaning of duplicate FinOps Trade Agreements finished. 
[INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Start adding the Sales Prices to Calculation @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value:
[INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error when creating the Calculation Sales Prices. @{length(outputs('List_Created_Calculation_Sales_Price')?['body/value'])} of @{variables('varNumberOfCalculationSalesPrice_ToProcess')} Sales Prices created. 
[ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error: @{variables('varError')} @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

parameters.item/body: Die kundenspezifischen Verkaufspreise für Artikel wurden erfolgreich aus den FinOps Handelsvereinbarungen für die Kalkulationsversion "@{triggerBody()?['text_3']}" erstellt.

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [SUC] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run was successful. All required FinOps Trade Agreement Sales Prices have been added to the Calculation.

parameters.item/body: Beim Erstellen der Kalkulations-Verkaufspreise (Kategorie) für die Kalkulationsversion "@{triggerBody()?['text_3']}" ist ein Fehler aufgetreten.

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run has failed. Trade Agreement Sales Prices may have been partially added to Calculation. Check Log for further details.
